So, between 11am and 3pm, he was at the electronic store. Then from 3pm to 4pm, he was at the bike shop. Then 4pm to 6pm at the bakery, and 6pm to 8pm at the theater. The coffee shop is closed after 8pm, so the latest he could have gone is before 8pm. Now, Andrew woke up at 8am. The first activity mentioned is at 11am. So from 8am to 11am, there's no information about where he was. Then he was at the electronic store from 11am to 3pm. So during those times, he was accounted for. The question is when could he have gone to the coffee shop. Since he was at various places during those times, the only time he wasn't seen doing something is between 8am and 11am. Because after that, he's at the electronic store until 3pm, then bike shop, etc. So the only window where he wasn't doing something is from when he woke up at 8am until 11am. Therefore, he could have gone to the coffee shop during that time. Let me check the options: Option C is 8am to 11am. That seems to be the answer. Let me double-check.
